allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py','model_loader.py','inverse_dynamics.py','simulation_runner.py','outer_loop.py','static_optimization.py']]; print\('All files parse OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py','model_loader.py','inverse_dynamics.py','simulation_runner.py','outer_loop.py','static_optimization.py']]; print\('All files parse OK'\)")

Bash(awk '-F\\t' '{for\(i=2;i<=NF;i++\) {sum[i]+=$i; count[i]++; if\($i<min[i] || min[i]==""\) min[i]=$i; if\($i>max[i]\) max[i]=$i}} END {for\(i=2;i<=NF;i++\) print "Col" i ": min=" min[i] ", max=" max[i] ", avg=" sum[i]/count[i]}')
Bash(awk '-F\\t' '{for\(i=2;i<=NF;i++\) {val=$i+0; if\(val>1.0\) found=1}} END {if\(found==1\) print "ALERT: Found values > 1.0 in activations"; else print "All activation values <= 1.0"}')
